title: Rhythm: pangram paragraph
description: Multiple pangrams in flow — full-alphabet rhythm exercise
text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog, while a wizard's job is to vex chumps quickly in fog. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump! Bright vixens jump; dozy fowl quack at the keyboard.
tips: Don't slow down on rare letters (z, q, x) — keep the tempo
If your peak hits 55 WPM here, you're ready for Block 5

character_tips.anna: Three pangrams in a row tests every letter under pressure. Stay smooth.
character_tips.maxim: Rare letters break rhythm — practice them in flow, not isolation.
character_tips.klavochka: All letters dancing in harmony, my precious 🎼
